name: omp-sandbox-aware
description: Awareness-only extension for omp running under srt (sandbox-runtime). Reads OMP_SANDBOX/PI_SANDBOX, reflects sandbox state in the TUI status line, exposes /sandbox. Part of the omp-sandbox-demo launch-wrapper design — does NOT intercept bash, does NOT import SandboxManager.
author: Audrey Tang <au@civic.ai>
